mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_permit_change WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_permit_change WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_change WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_change WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_permit_change ( change_type, title, description, request_date, planned_date, initiator, approver, impact_assessment, status, affected_permits, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{changeType}, #{title}, #{description,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{requestDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{plannedDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{initiator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{approver,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{impactAssessment,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{status}N'검토중', #{affectedPermits,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_permit_change SET change_type = #{changeType}, title = #{title}, description = #{description,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, request_date = #{requestDate,jdbcType=DATE}, planned_date = #{plannedDate,jdbcType=DATE}, initiator = #{initiator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, approver = #{approver,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, impact_assessment = #{impactAssessment,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, status = #{status}, affected_permits = #{affectedPermits,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, notes = #{notes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_permit_change SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
